label: agent loop • an unambiguous task must NOT stall on a clarify question
query: Create a file named greeting.txt containing exactly the line: Hello, world!
notes: The abstention discipline's false-positive guard: the task is fully specified, so a model that calls clarify here is over-cautious and wastes a turn. Pins that clarify is reserved for genuine ambiguity — the deterministic complement to clarify-on-ambiguity. The file assertion proves the work actually got done rather than deferred. Off-CI (needs a model).
